name: medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry errors cause cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of appointment logs into billing files instead of manual billing processes.
problem_solved: manual entry errors in billing submissions
